name: Priya Sharma
self_assessment:
THIS QUARTER I:
- I closed 41 Jira tickets and maintained 92% on-time delivery.
- I contributed 62 commits, merged 11 PRs, and reviewed 21 PRs.
- I supported team knowledge sharing by creating 3 and updating 6 Confluence docs.
- I completed 4 of 5 goals this quarter.

I AM PROUD OF:
I am most proud of balancing delivery and quality while actively supporting peers. I stayed consistent across execution and collaboration.

I WANT TO IMPROVE IN:
I want to improve documentation depth and make my project updates even more proactive. I also want to reduce avoidable rework by tightening planning quality.

MY GOAL NEXT QUARTER:
I will improve cross-team execution by publishing one high-impact technical note per sprint.
review_text:
PERFORMANCE SUMMARY:
Priya Sharma delivered an overall score of 7.6/10 for Q1 2026, with strong delivery (8.8) and quality (8.8). The employee closed 41 Jira tickets with 92% on-time delivery and contributed 62 commits.

KEY STRENGTHS:
- Strong execution with 41 tickets closed.
- Solid engineering output with 11 merged PRs and 21 PR reviews.
- Knowledge sharing through 3 docs created and 6 updates.

AREAS FOR IMPROVEMENT:
- Improve cross-functional documentation visibility and consistency.
- Continue focusing on preventive quality practices to lower rework risk.

RECOMMENDED RATING: 8.5 / 10.0
RECOMMENDED BAND: Exceeds Expectations
